chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.S-269 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.4316/2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For order on MA No.4317/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Mir Ali Bakhsh Talpur advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant A.G. Sindh. 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that there is civil dispute over the land between the parties but the official respondents are causing harassment to the petitioner at the behest of private respondents, which is contrary to law. Learned A.A.G. Sindh submits that the official respondents (police) are duty bound to act strictly in accordance with. He submits that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner; however, protection would be provided to the petitioner as and when needed. In view of above statement made by learned A.A.G. Sindh, the counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of with direction to the police officials not to create any sort of harassment to the petitioner; provide protection to the petitioner and act strictly in accordance with law. However, it is made clear that this order would not come in the way of civil or criminal litigation between the private parties. JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
